title: Voided Ward Overlay
description: Improves your PvP by updating a lot of minecrafts textures to improve PvP and allows you to use other resource packs with this pack
body:
Voided Ward Basic gives you all the PvP overlays you need this includes

- Dark GUI
- Invisible inventory for PvP
- Reduced particles for PvP
- Custom sweep hit particle
- Custom crosshair 
- Custom hotbar
- Cool font
- Low fire
- No smoke particles
- Low shield
- Small utils
- No eating particle
- Custom enchant glint
- No pumpkin blur
- Clear water
- Ore borders
- No fishing bober
- and more...

This is the basic version of Voided Ward Pack designed to be used as a overlay with any other packs that you like and give you all the PvP optimizations you need 

To use with other resource packs put this pack above all the other packs in your resource pack selection screen and everything should work fine.

Currently designed for

- Crystal PvP
- Sword PvP 
- SMP/Dia SMP PvP
- Mace PvP
- Axe PvP
- Neth/Dia Pot PvP
- UHC PvP

If you want previews and more in depth info on Voided Ward or want to give feedback ideas or bug reports join my discord server linked in this project!
